summary: Populate the empty sync since-param-format switch and drop webhook from default sync resources.
reason: Two defects in internal/cli/sync.go. (1) syncResourceSinceParamFormat had an empty switch and always returned "", so formatSyncSinceValue never reformatted RFC3339 cursor/--since values to YYYY-MM-DD for resources whose since param is `start_date` (Oura's v2 date params reject RFC3339 with 422). Delegated to syncResourceSinceParam: `start_date` -> "date", `start_datetime` -> "datetime". (2) defaultSyncResources included `webhook`, whose subscription routes require a separate x-client-id + x-client-secret credential pair outside the OAuth read surface, so every default `sync` run emitted webhook auth failures. Removed `webhook` from the default set. Both are generator-shaped gaps (empty format switch; resource-selection heuristic including a mutation surface).
validated_outcome: go build ./... && go vet ./... && cli-printing-press dogfood --dir . --live
